category_sources: Official Xidel homepage describes it as a command-line tool to download and extract data from HTML/XML pages and JSON APIs.
source_facts.description says it is an XPath/XQuery/JSONiq interpreter for extracting data from HTML/XML/JSON.
docs_sources: Official homepage has Documentation section and links to the official GitHub wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already provided; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists XPath/XQuery/JSON extraction documentation and wiki resources.
